  668: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  669: // .gitignore management
  670: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  671: 
  672: export function ensureGitignore(root: string, entry: string): void {
  673:   const gitignorePath = join(root, '.gitignore')
  674:   let existing = ''
  675:   if (existsSync(gitignorePath)) {
  676:     try {
  677:       existing = readFileSync(gitignorePath, 'utf-8')
  678:     } catch {
  679:       return
  680:     }
  681:   }
  682:   // Check if already present (normalize line endings)
  683:   const lines = existing.replace(/\r\n/g, '\n').split('\n')
  684:   if (lines.some(l => l.trim() === entry.trim())) return
  685: 
  686:   // Append with trailing newline
  687:   const append = existing.endsWith('\n') ? entry + '\n' : '\n' + entry + '\n'
  688:   try {
  689:     appendFileSync(gitignorePath, append, 'utf-8')
  690:   } catch {
  691:     // Best-effort
  692:   }
  693: }

   47: export async function buildReport(options: BuildReportOptions): Promise<void> {

   75:   mkdirSync(cacheDir, { recursive: true })

   77:   // Ensure Memory/07_reports is gitignored

   79: 
   80:   // Load all manifests (own project + extra registered projects)
   81:   const manifests = [

   84:   ]
   85: 
   86:   // Build link graph from clean markdown

   88: 
   89:   // Accumulate tool counts while processing transcripts

  127:     // Summarize + render (deferred to allow parallel API calls)

  193:   // Goals page

  199: 
  200:   // Knowledge page

  242: 
  243:   // RSS Feed

  245:

  254:   } else if (cname) {

  258: 
  259:   // Webhook notification (non-blocking on failure)

  323: // Clean markdown message parsing
  324: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  325: 
  326: /** Parse messages from a clean markdown file. */
  327: export function parseCleanMarkdownMessages(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): RenderedMessage[] {
  328:   const repoPath = m.repo_clean_path ? join(root, m.repo_clean_path) : null
  329:   const cleanPath = (repoPath && existsSync(repoPath)) ? repoPath : m.global_clean_path
  330:   if (!cleanPath || !existsSync(cleanPath)) return []
  331: 
  332:   let content: string
  333:   try {
  334:     content = readFileSync(cleanPath, 'utf-8')
  335:   } catch {
  336:     return []
  337:   }
  338: 
  339:   return parseMessagesFromMarkdown(content)
  340: }
  341: 
  342: /** Extract role/timestamp/text from clean markdown format. */
  343: export function parseMessagesFromMarkdown(content: string): RenderedMessage[] {
  344:   const messages: RenderedMessage[] = []
  345: 
  346:   // Find ## Messages section
  347:   const msgSection = content.indexOf('\n## Messages')
  348:   if (msgSection === -1) return []
  349: 
  350:   const body = content.slice(msgSection + 12) // after "## Messages\n"
  351: 
  352:   // Split on ### N. role headers
  353:   const msgRe = /^### \d+\.\s+(\w+)/gm
  354:   let match: RegExpExecArray | null
  355:   const starts: Array<{ index: number; role: string }> = []
  356: 
  357:   while ((match = msgRe.exec(body)) !== null) {
  358:     starts.push({ index: match.index, role: match[1] ?? 'unknown' })
  359:   }
  360: 
  361:   for (let i = 0; i < starts.length; i++) {
  362:     const start = starts[i]
  363:     if (!start) continue
  364:     const nextStart = starts[i + 1]
  365:     const chunk = nextStart
  366:       ? body.slice(start.index, nextStart.index)
  367:       : body.slice(start.index)
  368: 
  369:     const lines = chunk.split('\n')
  370:     // First line is the header, second may be timestamp
  371:     let timestamp = ''
  372:     const textLines: string[] = []
  373:     let pastHeader = false
  374: 
  375:     for (const line of lines) {
  376:       if (!pastHeader && line.startsWith('### ')) {
  377:         pastHeader = true
  378:         continue
  379:       }
  380:       if (!pastHeader) continue
  381:       const tsMatch = line.match(/^- Timestamp:\s*`([^`]+)`/)
  382:       if (tsMatch && !timestamp) {
  383:         timestamp = tsMatch[1] ?? ''
  384:         continue
  385:       }
  386:       textLines.push(line)
  387:     }
  388: 
  389:     // Remove leading/trailing blank lines from text
  390:     const text = textLines.join('\n').trim()
  391:     if (text || timestamp) {
  392:       messages.push({ role: start.role, timestamp, text })
  393:     }
  394:   }
  395: 
  396:   return messages
  397: }
  398: 
  399: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  400: // Raw transcript tool extraction
  401: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  402: 
  403: /** Best-effort extraction of tool event summaries from a raw JSONL file. */
  404: function extractToolSummariesFromRaw(rawPath: string, _client: string): string[] {
  405:   const summaries: string[] = []
  406:   let content: string
  407:   try {
  408:     content = readFileSync(rawPath, 'utf-8')
  409:   } catch {
  410:     return []
  411:   }
  412: 
  413:   for (const line of content.split('\n')) {
  414:     const trimmed = line.trim()
  415:     if (!trimmed) continue
  416:     try {
  417:       const record = JSON.parse(trimmed) as Record<string, unknown>
  418:       // Codex: function_call type
  419:       const type = record['type'] as string | undefined
  420:       if (type === 'function_call' || type === 'custom_tool_call') {
  421:         const name = (record['name'] as string | undefined) ?? type
  422:         summaries.push(name)
  423:         continue
  424:       }
  425:       // Claude: tool_use content blocks
  426:       const payload = record['message'] as Record<string, unknown> | undefined
  427:       const content2 = (payload?.['content'] ?? record['content']) as unknown[] | undefined
  428:       if (Array.isArray(content2)) {
  429:         for (const block of content2) {
  430:           if (
  431:             block !== null &&
  432:             typeof block === 'object' &&
  433:             (block as Record<string, unknown>)['type'] === 'tool_use'
  434:           ) {
  435:             const name = ((block as Record<string, unknown>)['name'] as string | undefined) ?? 'tool_use'
  436:             summaries.push(name)
  437:           }
  438:         }
  439:       }
  440:     } catch {
  441:       // Skip malformed lines
  442:     }
  443:   }
  444: 
  445:   return summaries
  446: }
  447: 
  448: function extractToolNamesFromEvents(events: TranscriptEvent[]): string[] {
  449:   return events
  450:     .filter((event): event is Extract<TranscriptEvent, { kind: 'tool_call' }> => event.kind === 'tool_call')
  451:     .map(event => event.tool_name)
  452: }

  454: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

  458: function transcriptOutputPath(output: string, m: ManifestEntry): string {
  459:   const cleanPath = m.repo_clean_path || m.global_clean_path || ''
  460:   const stem = cleanPath ? basename(cleanPath, '.md') : m.session_id
  461:   return join(output, 'transcripts', m.client, `${stem}.html`)

  463: 
  464: function resolveRawPath(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): string | null {
  465:   if (m.repo_raw_path) {
  466:     const repoPath = join(root, m.repo_raw_path)
  467:     if (existsSync(repoPath)) return repoPath
  468:   }
  469:   if (m.global_raw_path) {
  470:     return m.global_raw_path
  471:   }
  472:   return null
  473: }
  474: 
  475: function resolveFullPath(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): string | null {
  476:   if (m.repo_full_path) {
  477:     const repoPath = join(root, m.repo_full_path)
  478:     if (existsSync(repoPath)) return repoPath
  479:   }
  480:   if (m.global_full_path && existsSync(m.global_full_path)) {
  481:     return m.global_full_path
  482:   }
  483:   const derivedRepoPath = deriveFullPathFromCleanPath(m.repo_clean_path ? join(root, m.repo_clean_path) : '')
  484:   if (derivedRepoPath) {
  485:     return derivedRepoPath
  486:   }
  487:   const derivedGlobalPath = deriveFullPathFromCleanPath(m.global_clean_path)
  488:   if (derivedGlobalPath) {
  489:     return derivedGlobalPath
  490:   }
  491:   return null

  493: 
  494: function loadNormalizedTranscript(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): ParsedTranscript | null {
  495:   const fullPath = resolveFullPath(m, root)
  496:   if (!fullPath) return null
  497: 
  498:   try {
  499:     const raw = readFileSync(fullPath, 'utf-8')
  500:     const parsed = JSON.parse(raw) as Record<string, unknown>
  501:     if (
  502:       !Array.isArray(parsed['messages']) ||
  503:       !Array.isArray(parsed['tool_events']) ||
  504:       !Array.isArray(parsed['events'])

  506:       return null
  507:     }
  508: 
  509:     return {
  510:       client: String(parsed['client'] ?? m.client) as ParsedTranscript['client'],
  511:       session_id: String(parsed['session_id'] ?? m.session_id),
  512:       title: String(parsed['title'] ?? m.title),
  513:       started_at: String(parsed['started_at'] ?? m.started_at),
  514:       cwd: String(parsed['cwd'] ?? m.cwd),
  515:       branch: String(parsed['branch'] ?? m.branch),
  516:       messages: parsed['messages'] as ParsedTranscript['messages'],
  517:       tool_events: parsed['tool_events'] as ParsedTranscript['tool_events'],
  518:       events: parsed['events'] as ParsedTranscript['events'],
  519:       source_path: String(parsed['source_path'] ?? m.raw_source_path),

  525: 
  526: function loadStructuredTranscript(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): ParsedTranscript | null {
  527:   const normalizedTranscript = loadNormalizedTranscript(m, root)
  528:   if (normalizedTranscript) {

  543: 
  544: function deriveFullPathFromCleanPath(cleanPath: string): string | null {
  545:   if (!cleanPath || !existsSync(cleanPath)) return null
  546:   const fullPath = cleanPath
  547:     .replace(/[\\/]clean[\\/]/, '/full/')
  548:     .replace(/\.md$/i, '.json')
  549:   return existsSync(fullPath) ? fullPath : null
  550: }
  551: 
  552: function toRenderedMessage(message: ParsedTranscript['messages'][number]): RenderedMessage {
  553:   return {
  554:     role: message.role,
  555:     timestamp: message.timestamp ?? '',
  556:     text: message.text,

  559: 
  560: function snippetFromEvents(events: TranscriptEvent[]): string {
  561:   for (const event of events) {
  562:     if (event.kind === 'message') {
  563:       return event.text.slice(0, 300)
  564:     }
  565:     if (event.kind === 'reasoning') {
  566:       const text = event.text || event.summary || ''
  567:       if (text) return text.slice(0, 300)
  568:     }
  569:     if (event.summary) {
  570:       return event.summary.slice(0, 300)
  571:     }
  572:   }
  573:   return ''
  574: }
  575: 
  576: function buildSearchText(messages: RenderedMessage[], events: TranscriptEvent[]): string {
  577:   const headParts: string[] = []
  578:   const bodyParts: string[] = []
  579: 
  580:   if (events.length > 0) {
  581:     for (const event of events) {
  582:       if (event.kind === 'message') {
  583:         bodyParts.push(event.role, event.text)
  584:         continue
  585:       }
  586:       if (event.kind === 'reasoning') {
  587:         headParts.push(event.text || event.summary || 'reasoning')
  588:         continue
  589:       }
  590:       if (event.kind === 'tool_call' || event.kind === 'tool_result') {
  591:         headParts.push(event.tool_name, event.summary || '')
  592:         continue
  593:       }
  594:       if (event.title) {
  595:         headParts.push(event.title)
  596:       }
  597:       if (event.summary) {
  598:         headParts.push(event.summary)
  599:       }
  600:     }
  601:   } else {
  602:     for (const message of messages) {
  603:       bodyParts.push(message.role, message.text)
  604:     }
  605:   }
  606: 
  607:   return normalizeSearchText([...headParts, ...bodyParts].join('\n')).slice(0, 1600)
  608: }
  609: 
  610: function normalizeSearchText(text: string): string {
  611:   return text.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim()
  612: }

  668: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

  672: export function ensureGitignore(root: string, entry: string): void {
  673:   const gitignorePath = join(root, '.gitignore')
  674:   let existing = ''
  675:   if (existsSync(gitignorePath)) {
  676:     try {
  677:       existing = readFileSync(gitignorePath, 'utf-8')
  678:     } catch {
  679:       return
  680:     }
  681:   }
  682:   // Check if already present (normalize line endings)
  683:   const lines = existing.replace(/\r\n/g, '\n').split('\n')
  684:   if (lines.some(l => l.trim() === entry.trim())) return
  685: 
  686:   // Append with trailing newline
  687:   const append = existing.endsWith('\n') ? entry + '\n' : '\n' + entry + '\n'
  688:   try {
  689:     appendFileSync(gitignorePath, append, 'utf-8')
  690:   } catch {
  691:     // Best-effort
  692:   }
  693: }

    1: /**
    2:  * Transcript import 鈥?orchestration, cleaning, and manifest management.
    3:  * Port of scripts/_transcript_import.py
    4:  */
    5: 
    6: import { copyFileSync, existsSync, mkdirSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync, appendFileSync } from 'node:fs'
    7: import { dirname, extname, join, basename, relative } from 'node:path'
    8: 
    9: import type { ManifestEntry, ParsedTranscript, TranscriptArtifact } from '../types/transcript.js'
   10: import { toPosixPath } from '../utils/path.js'
   11: import {
   12:   loadJson,
   13:   normalizeTimestamp,
   14:   sha256File,
   15:   slugify,
   16:   timestampPartition,
   17:   yamlEscape,
   18: } from './common.js'
   19: import { upsertSearchIndex } from './db.js'
   20: 
   21: export async function importTranscript(
   22:   parsed: ParsedTranscript,
   23:   root: string,
   24:   globalRoot: string,
   25:   projectSlug: string,
   26:   rawUploadPermission: string,
   27:   mirrorToRepo = true,
   28: ): Promise<ManifestEntry> {
   29:   const importedAt = normalizeTimestamp(new Date())
   30:   const rawSha256 = sha256File(parsed.source_path)
   31:   const sessionLabel = slugify(
   32:     parsed.session_id,
   33:     slugify(stemOf(parsed.source_path), 'session'),
   34:   )
   35:   const artifactStem = `${sessionLabel}__${rawSha256.slice(0, 8)}`
   36:   const sourceSuffix = extname(parsed.source_path) || '.txt'
   37: 
   38:   const [yearToken, monthToken] = timestampPartition(parsed.started_at || importedAt)
   39: 
   40:   const repoRoot = join(root, 'Memory', '06_transcripts')
   41:   const repoRawPath = join(repoRoot, 'raw', parsed.client, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}${sourceSuffix}`)
   42:   const repoCleanPath = join(repoRoot, 'clean', parsed.client, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.md`)
   43:   const repoManifestPath = join(repoRoot, 'manifests', parsed.client, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.json`)
   44:   const repoFullPath = join(repoRoot, 'full', parsed.client, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.json`)
   45: 
   46:   const globalRawPath = join(globalRoot, 'raw', parsed.client, projectSlug, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}${sourceSuffix}`)
   47:   const globalCleanPath = join(globalRoot, 'clean', parsed.client, projectSlug, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.md`)
   48:   const globalManifestPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'manifests', parsed.client, projectSlug, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.json`)
   49:   const globalFullPath = join(globalRoot, 'full', parsed.client, projectSlug, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.json`)
   50:   const globalEventLogPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'sessions.jsonl')
   51:   const globalDbPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'search.sqlite')
   52: 
   53:   for (const p of [globalRawPath, globalCleanPath, globalManifestPath, globalFullPath, globalEventLogPath, globalDbPath]) {
   54:     mkdirSync(dirname(p), { recursive: true })
   55:   }
   56:   if (mirrorToRepo) {
   57:     for (const p of [repoRawPath, repoCleanPath, repoManifestPath, repoFullPath]) {
   58:       mkdirSync(dirname(p), { recursive: true })
   59:     }
   60:   }
   61: 
   62:   if (mirrorToRepo) {
   63:     copyFile(parsed.source_path, repoRawPath)
   64:   }
   65:   copyFile(parsed.source_path, globalRawPath)
   66: 
   67:   let manifest: ManifestEntry = {
   68:     client: parsed.client,
   69:     project: projectSlug,
   70:     session_id: parsed.session_id,
   71:     title: parsed.title,
   72:     started_at: parsed.started_at,
   73:     imported_at: importedAt,
   74:     cwd: parsed.cwd,
   75:     branch: parsed.branch,
   76:     raw_source_path: toPosixPath(parsed.source_path),
   77:     raw_sha256: rawSha256,
   78:     raw_upload_permission: rawUploadPermission,
   79:     repo_raw_path: mirrorToRepo ? toPosixPath(relative(root, repoRawPath)) : '',
   80:     repo_clean_path: mirrorToRepo ? toPosixPath(relative(root, repoCleanPath)) : '',
   81:     repo_manifest_path: mirrorToRepo ? toPosixPath(relative(root, repoManifestPath)) : '',
   82:     repo_full_path: mirrorToRepo ? toPosixPath(relative(root, repoFullPath)) : '',
   83:     global_raw_path: toPosixPath(globalRawPath),
   84:     global_clean_path: toPosixPath(globalCleanPath),
   85:     global_manifest_path: toPosixPath(globalManifestPath),
   86:     global_full_path: toPosixPath(globalFullPath),
   87:     message_count: parsed.messages.length,
   88:     tool_event_count: parsed.tool_events.length,
   89:     event_count: parsed.events.length,
   90:     cleaning_mode: 'deterministic-code',
   91:     repo_mirror_enabled: mirrorToRepo,
   92:   }
   93: 
   94:   const existingGlobalManifest = loadJson(globalManifestPath)
   95:   manifest = preserveExistingImportTimestamp(existingGlobalManifest, manifest)
   96: 
   97:   if (mirrorToRepo) {
   98:     writeCleanMarkdown(parsed, manifest, repoCleanPath)
   99:     writeFullJson(parsed, repoFullPath)
  100:   }
  101:   writeCleanMarkdown(parsed, manifest, globalCleanPath)
  102:   writeFullJson(parsed, globalFullPath)
  103:   const manifestRecord = { ...manifest } as Record<string, unknown>
  104:   if (mirrorToRepo) {
  105:     writeJson(repoManifestPath, manifestRecord)
  106:   }
  107:   const appendToEventLog = existingGlobalManifest === null || !deepEqual(existingGlobalManifest, manifestRecord)
  108:   writeJson(globalManifestPath, manifestRecord)
  109:   if (appendToEventLog) {
  110:     appendJsonl(globalEventLogPath, manifestRecord)
  111:   }
  112:   await upsertSearchIndex(globalDbPath, manifest)
  113: 
  114:   return manifest
  115: }
  116: 
  117: export function transcriptHasContent(parsed: ParsedTranscript): boolean {
  118:   return parsed.messages.length > 0 || parsed.tool_events.length > 0 || parsed.events.length > 0
  119: }
  120: 
  121: export function writeCleanMarkdown(parsed: ParsedTranscript, manifest: ManifestEntry, filePath: string): void {
  122:   const lines: string[] = [
  123:     '---',
  124:     `client: ${manifest.client}`,
  125:     `project: ${manifest.project}`,
  126:     `session_id: ${manifest.session_id}`,
  127:     `title: ${yamlEscape(manifest.title)}`,
  128:     `started_at: ${manifest.started_at}`,
  129:     `imported_at: ${manifest.imported_at}`,
  130:     `cwd: ${yamlEscape(manifest.cwd)}`,
  131:     `branch: ${yamlEscape(manifest.branch)}`,
  132:     `raw_source_path: ${yamlEscape(manifest.raw_source_path)}`,
  133:     `raw_sha256: ${manifest.raw_sha256}`,
  134:     `raw_upload_permission: ${manifest.raw_upload_permission}`,
  135:     `cleaning_mode: ${manifest.cleaning_mode}`,
  136:     '---',
  137:     '',
  138:     `# ${manifest.title || manifest.session_id}`,
  139:     '',
  140:     '## Metadata',
  141:     `- Client: \`${manifest.client}\``,
  142:     `- Project: \`${manifest.project}\``,
  143:     `- Session ID: \`${manifest.session_id}\``,
  144:     `- Started At: \`${manifest.started_at}\``,
  145:     `- Imported At: \`${manifest.imported_at}\``,
  146:     `- Raw SHA256: \`${manifest.raw_sha256}\``,
  147:     `- Raw Source: \`${manifest.raw_source_path}\``,
  148:     `- Repo Raw Path: \`${manifest.repo_raw_path}\``,
  149:     `- Repo Clean Path: \`${manifest.repo_clean_path}\``,
  150:     '',
  151:     '## Messages',
  152:   ]
  153: 
  154:   if (parsed.messages.length > 0) {
  155:     for (let i = 0; i < parsed.messages.length; i++) {
  156:       const message = parsed.messages[i]!
  157:       lines.push(
  158:         `### ${i + 1}. ${message.role}`,
  159:         `- Timestamp: \`${message.timestamp ?? manifest.started_at}\``,
  160:         '',
  161:         message.text,
  162:         '',
  163:       )
  164:     }
  165:   } else {
  166:     lines.push(
  167:       'No user or assistant messages were extracted deterministically from the source transcript.',
  168:       '',
  169:     )
  170:   }
  171: 
  172:   writeFileSync(filePath, lines.join('\n'), 'utf-8')
  173: }
  174: 
  175: export function writeFullJson(parsed: ParsedTranscript, filePath: string): void {
  176:   const artifact: TranscriptArtifact = {
  177:     schema_version: 'transcript.full.v1',
  178:     ...parsed,
  179:   }
  180:   writeFileSync(filePath, JSON.stringify(artifact, null, 2) + '\n', 'utf-8')
  181: }
  182: 
  183: export function preserveExistingImportTimestamp(
  184:   existing: Record<string, unknown> | null,
  185:   payload: ManifestEntry,
  186: ): ManifestEntry {
  187:   if (existing === null) return payload
  188:   const payloadRecord = { ...payload } as Record<string, unknown>
  189:   if (!deepEqual(manifestSignature(existing), manifestSignature(payloadRecord))) return payload
  190:   const importedAt = existing['imported_at']
  191:   if (typeof importedAt === 'string' && importedAt) {
  192:     return { ...payload, imported_at: importedAt }
  193:   }
  194:   return payload
  195: }
  196: 
  197: export function manifestSignature(payload: Record<string, unknown>): Record<string, unknown> {
  198:   const result: Record<string, unknown> = {}
  199:   for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(payload)) {
  200:     if (key !== 'imported_at') {
  201:       result[key] = value
  202:     }
  203:   }
  204:   return result
  205: }
  206: 
  207: export function manifestChanged(filePath: string, payload: Record<string, unknown>): boolean {
  208:   if (!existsSync(filePath)) return true
  209:   try {
  210:     const current = JSON.parse(readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8')) as Record<string, unknown>
  211:     return !deepEqual(current, payload)
  212:   } catch {
  213:     return true
  214:   }
  215: }
  216: 
  217: export function writeJson(filePath: string, payload: Record<string, unknown>): void {
  218:   writeFileSync(filePath, JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2) + '\n', 'utf-8')
  219: }
  220: 
  221: export function appendJsonl(filePath: string, payload: Record<string, unknown>): void {
  222:   appendFileSync(filePath, JSON.stringify(payload) + '\n', 'utf-8')
  223: }
  224: 
  225: export function copyFile(source: string, destination: string): void {
  226:   if (source === destination) return
  227:   copyFileSync(source, destination)
  228: }
  229: 
  230: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  231: // Internal helpers
  232: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  233: 
  234: function stemOf(filePath: string): string {
  235:   const base = basename(filePath)
  236:   const ext = extname(base)
  237:   return ext ? base.slice(0, -ext.length) : base
  238: }
  239: 
  240: function deepEqual(a: unknown, b: unknown): boolean {
  241:   if (a === b) return true
  242:   if (a === null || b === null || typeof a !== typeof b) return false
  243:   if (typeof a !== 'object') return false
  244:   if (Array.isArray(a) !== Array.isArray(b)) return false
  245:   const aObj = a as Record<string, unknown>
  246:   const bObj = b as Record<string, unknown>
  247:   const aKeys = Object.keys(aObj)
  248:   const bKeys = Object.keys(bObj)
  249:   if (aKeys.length !== bKeys.length) return false
  250:   return aKeys.every(key => deepEqual(aObj[key], bObj[key]))
  251: }

    1: /**
    2:  * Transcript discovery 鈥?file scanning and project matching.
    3:  * Port of scripts/_transcript_discover.py
    4:  */
    5: 
    6: import { existsSync, statSync } from 'node:fs'
    7: import { homedir } from 'node:os'
    8: import { basename, dirname, resolve } from 'node:path'
    9: 
   10: import fg from 'fast-glob'
   11: 
   12: import type { ParsedTranscript } from '../types/transcript.js'
   13: import { slugify, CLIENTS } from './common.js'
   14: import { toPosixPath } from '../utils/path.js'
   15: 
   16: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   17: // Glob patterns per client
   18: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   19: 
   20: const CLIENT_PATTERNS: Readonly<Record<string, readonly string[]>> = {
   21:   codex: ['sessions/**/*.jsonl'],
   22:   claude: ['projects/**/*.jsonl'],
   23:   gemini: [
   24:     'tmp/*/checkpoints/**/*.json',
   25:     'tmp/*/checkpoints/**/*.jsonl',
   26:     'history/**/*.json',
   27:     'history/**/*.jsonl',
   28:     'chats/**/*.json',
   29:     'chats/**/*.jsonl',
   30:   ],
   31: }
   32: 
   33: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   34: // Defaults
   35: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   36: 
   37: export function defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot(): string {
   38:   return toPosixPath(resolve(homedir(), '.memorytree', 'transcripts'))
   39: }
   40: 
   41: export function defaultClientRoots(): Record<string, string> {
   42:   const home = homedir()
   43:   return {
   44:     codex: resolve(home, '.codex'),
   45:     claude: resolve(home, '.claude'),
   46:     gemini: resolve(home, '.gemini'),
   47:   }
   48: }
   49: 
   50: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   51: // File discovery
   52: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   53: 
   54: export function discoverSourceFiles(
   55:   clients?: ReadonlySet<string>,
   56:   roots?: Readonly<Record<string, string>>,
   57: ): Array<[string, string]> {
   58:   const requested = clients ?? CLIENTS
   59:   const resolvedRoots = roots ?? defaultClientRoots()
   60:   const matches: Array<[string, string]> = []
   61:   const seen = new Set<string>()
   62: 
   63:   for (const client of [...requested].sort()) {
   64:     const root: string | undefined = resolvedRoots[client]
   65:     if (root === undefined || !existsSync(root)) continue
   66: 
   67:     const patterns = CLIENT_PATTERNS[client]
   68:     if (patterns === undefined) continue
   69: 
   70:     for (const pattern of patterns) {
   71:       const paths = fg.sync(pattern, { cwd: root, absolute: true, onlyFiles: true })
   72:       for (const filePath of paths) {
   73:         const resolved = toPosixPath(resolve(filePath))
   74:         const key = resolved.toLowerCase()
   75:         if (seen.has(key)) continue
   76:         seen.add(key)
   77:         matches.push([client, resolved])
   78:       }
   79:     }
   80:   }
   81: 
   82:   matches.sort((a, b) => {
   83:     const mtimeA = safeFileMtime(a[1])
   84:     const mtimeB = safeFileMtime(b[1])
   85:     if (mtimeB !== mtimeA) return mtimeB - mtimeA
   86:     const pathA = a[1].toLowerCase()
   87:     const pathB = b[1].toLowerCase()
   88:     // Reverse sort: higher path string comes first (matching Python's reverse=True)
   89:     if (pathB > pathA) return 1
   90:     if (pathB < pathA) return -1
   91:     return 0
   92:   })
   93: 
   94:   return matches
   95: }
   96: 
   97: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   98: // Project slug inference
   99: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  100: 
  101: export function inferProjectSlug(parsed: ParsedTranscript): string {
  102:   if (parsed.cwd) {
  103:     try {
  104:       const cwdBase = basename(parsed.cwd)
  105:       return slugify(cwdBase, 'project')
  106:     } catch {
  107:       // fall through
  108:     }
  109:   }
  110: 
  111:   if (parsed.client === 'claude') {
  112:     let parentName = basename(dirname(parsed.source_path)).toLowerCase()
  113:     parentName = parentName.replace(/^[a-z]--/, '')
  114:     return slugify(parentName, 'project')
  115:   }
  116: 
  117:   if (parsed.client === 'gemini') {
  118:     const parentDir = basename(dirname(parsed.source_path))
  119:     if (parentDir) {
  120:       return slugify(parentDir, 'project')
  121:     }
  122:   }
  123: 
  124:   return 'unknown-project'
  125: }
  126: 
  127: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  128: // Repo matching
  129: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  130: 
  131: export function transcriptMatchesRepo(
  132:   parsed: ParsedTranscript,
  133:   repoRoot: string,
  134:   repoSlug: string,
  135: ): boolean {
  136:   const normalizedRepo = toPosixPath(resolve(repoRoot)).toLowerCase()
  137: 
  138:   if (parsed.cwd) {
  139:     try {
  140:       const normalizedCwd = toPosixPath(resolve(parsed.cwd)).toLowerCase()
  141:       if (normalizedCwd === normalizedRepo) return true
  142:       // Check if repoRoot is a parent of cwd
  143:       const repoPrefix = normalizedRepo.endsWith('/')
  144:         ? normalizedRepo
  145:         : normalizedRepo + '/'
  146:       if (normalizedCwd.startsWith(repoPrefix)) return true
  147:     } catch {
  148:       // fall through
  149:     }
  150:   }
  151: 
  152:   return projectSlugsMatch(inferProjectSlug(parsed), repoSlug)
  153: }
  154: 
  155: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  156: // Slug matching
  157: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  158: 
  159: export function projectSlugsMatch(left: string, right: string): boolean {
  160:   return Boolean(
  161:     left && right && left === right && left !== 'unknown-project',
  162:   )
  163: }
  164: 
  165: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  166: // Safe mtime
  167: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  168: 
  169: export function safeFileMtime(filePath: string): number {
  170:   try {
  171:     return statSync(filePath).mtimeMs / 1000
  172:   } catch {
  173:     return 0
  174:   }
  175: }

   70:     for (const pattern of patterns) {
   71:       const paths = fg.sync(pattern, { cwd: root, absolute: true, onlyFiles: true })
   72:       for (const filePath of paths) {
   73:         const resolved = toPosixPath(resolve(filePath))
   74:         const key = resolved.toLowerCase()
   75:         if (seen.has(key)) continue
   76:         seen.add(key)
   77:         matches.push([client, resolved])
   78:       }
   79:     }
   80:   }
   81: 
   82:   matches.sort((a, b) => {
   83:     const mtimeA = safeFileMtime(a[1])
   84:     const mtimeB = safeFileMtime(b[1])
   85:     if (mtimeB !== mtimeA) return mtimeB - mtimeA
   86:     const pathA = a[1].toLowerCase()
   87:     const pathB = b[1].toLowerCase()
   88:     // Reverse sort: higher path string comes first (matching Python's reverse=True)
   89:     if (pathB > pathA) return 1
   90:     if (pathB < pathA) return -1
   91:     return 0
   92:   })
   93: 
   94:   return matches
   95: }
   96: 
   97: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   98: // Project slug inference
   99: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  100: 
  101: export function inferProjectSlug(parsed: ParsedTranscript): string {
  102:   if (parsed.cwd) {
  103:     try {
  104:       const cwdBase = basename(parsed.cwd)
  105:       return slugify(cwdBase, 'project')
  106:     } catch {
  107:       // fall through
  108:     }
  109:   }
  110: 
  111:   if (parsed.client === 'claude') {
  112:     let parentName = basename(dirname(parsed.source_path)).toLowerCase()
  113:     parentName = parentName.replace(/^[a-z]--/, '')
  114:     return slugify(parentName, 'project')
  115:   }
  116: 
  117:   if (parsed.client === 'gemini') {
  118:     const parentDir = basename(dirname(parsed.source_path))
  119:     if (parentDir) {
  120:       return slugify(parentDir, 'project')
  121:     }
  122:   }
  123: 
  124:   return 'unknown-project'
  125: }
  126: 
  127: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  128: // Repo matching
  129: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  130: 
  131: export function transcriptMatchesRepo(
  132:   parsed: ParsedTranscript,
  133:   repoRoot: string,
  134:   repoSlug: string,
  135: ): boolean {
  136:   const normalizedRepo = toPosixPath(resolve(repoRoot)).toLowerCase()
  137: 
  138:   if (parsed.cwd) {
  139:     try {
  140:       const normalizedCwd = toPosixPath(resolve(parsed.cwd)).toLowerCase()
  141:       if (normalizedCwd === normalizedRepo) return true
  142:       // Check if repoRoot is a parent of cwd
  143:       const repoPrefix = normalizedRepo.endsWith('/')
  144:         ? normalizedRepo
  145:         : normalizedRepo + '/'
  146:       if (normalizedCwd.startsWith(repoPrefix)) return true
  147:     } catch {
  148:       // fall through
  149:     }
  150:   }
  151: 
  152:   return projectSlugsMatch(inferProjectSlug(parsed), repoSlug)
  153: }
  154: 
  155: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  156: // Slug matching
  157: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  158: 
  159: export function projectSlugsMatch(left: string, right: string): boolean {
  160:   return Boolean(
  161:     left && right && left === right && left !== 'unknown-project',
  162:   )
  163: }
  164: 
  165: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  166: // Safe mtime
  167: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  168: 
  169: export function safeFileMtime(filePath: string): number {
  170:   try {
  171:     return statSync(filePath).mtimeMs / 1000
  172:   } catch {
  173:     return 0
  174:   }
  175: }

    1: /**
    2:  * Transcript search index 鈥?SQLite upsert for the global transcript catalog.
    3:  *
    4:  * Uses sql.js (WebAssembly SQLite) so the module works without a native
    5:  * sqlite3 binding.  The WASM init is async; we cache the resulting factory
    6:  * promise so it is only resolved once per process.
    7:  */
    8: 
    9: import initSqlJs, { type SqlJsStatic } from 'sql.js'
   10: import { existsSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync } from 'node:fs'
   11: import type { ManifestEntry } from '../types/transcript.js'
   12: 
   13: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   14: // Lazy sql.js initialisation (cached promise)
   15: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   16: 
   17: let sqlPromise: Promise<SqlJsStatic> | null = null
   18: 
   19: function getSqlJs(): Promise<SqlJsStatic> {
   20:   if (sqlPromise === null) {
   21:     sqlPromise = initSqlJs()
   22:   }
   23:   return sqlPromise
   24: }
   25: 
   26: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   27: // Column definitions
   28: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   29: 
   30: const PK_COLUMNS = [
   31:   'client',
   32:   'project',
   33:   'session_id',
   34:   'raw_sha256',
   35: ] as const
   36: 
   37: const DATA_COLUMNS = [
   38:   'title',
   39:   'started_at',
   40:   'imported_at',
   41:   'cwd',
   42:   'branch',
   43:   'raw_source_path',
   44:   'raw_upload_permission',
   45:   'global_raw_path',
   46:   'global_clean_path',
   47:   'global_manifest_path',
   48:   'global_full_path',
   49:   'repo_raw_path',
   50:   'repo_clean_path',
   51:   'repo_manifest_path',
   52:   'repo_full_path',
   53:   'message_count',
   54:   'tool_event_count',
   55:   'event_count',
   56: ] as const
   57: 
   58: const ALL_COLUMNS = [...PK_COLUMNS, ...DATA_COLUMNS] as const
   59: type ColumnName = (typeof ALL_COLUMNS)[number]
   60: 
   61: const COLUMN_DEFS: Record<ColumnName, { type: 'TEXT' | 'INTEGER'; defaultValue: string }> = {
   62:   client: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   63:   project: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   64:   session_id: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   65:   raw_sha256: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   66:   title: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   67:   started_at: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   68:   imported_at: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   69:   cwd: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   70:   branch: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   71:   raw_source_path: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   72:   raw_upload_permission: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   73:   global_raw_path: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   74:   global_clean_path: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   75:   global_manifest_path: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   76:   global_full_path: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   77:   repo_raw_path: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   78:   repo_clean_path: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   79:   repo_manifest_path: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   80:   repo_full_path: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   81:   message_count: { type: 'INTEGER', defaultValue: '0' },
   82:   tool_event_count: { type: 'INTEGER', defaultValue: '0' },
   83:   event_count: { type: 'INTEGER', defaultValue: '0' },
   84: }
   85: 
   86: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   87: // SQL statements (built once)
   88: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   89: 
   90: const CREATE_TABLE_SQL = `
   91:   CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS transcripts (
   92:     ${ALL_COLUMNS.map((column) => columnDefinition(column)).join(',\n    ')},
   93:     PRIMARY KEY (client, project, session_id, raw_sha256)
   94:   )
   95: `
   96: 
   97: const UPSERT_SQL = `
   98:   INSERT INTO transcripts (
   99:     ${ALL_COLUMNS.join(', ')}
  100:   ) VALUES (${ALL_COLUMNS.map(() => '?').join(', ')})
  101:   ON CONFLICT(${PK_COLUMNS.join(', ')}) DO UPDATE SET
  102:     ${DATA_COLUMNS.map((c) => `${c} = excluded.${c}`).join(',\n    ')}
  103: `
  104: 
  105: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  106: // Public API
  107: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  108: 
  109: /**
  110:  * Insert or update a single transcript manifest row in the SQLite search
  111:  * index at `dbPath`.  Creates the database and table if they do not exist.
  112:  *
  113:  * The function is async because the first call must initialise the sql.js
  114:  * WASM module.
  115:  */
  116: export async function upsertSearchIndex(
  117:   dbPath: string,
  118:   manifest: ManifestEntry,
  119: ): Promise<void> {
  120:   const SQL = await getSqlJs()
  121: 
  122:   const db = existsSync(dbPath)
  123:     ? new SQL.Database(readFileSync(dbPath))
  124:     : new SQL.Database()
  125: 
  126:   try {
  127:     db.run('PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL')
  128:     ensureTableSchema(db)
  129: 
  130:     const record: Record<string, unknown> = { ...manifest }
  131:     const params = ALL_COLUMNS.map((col) => {
  132:       const value = record[col]
  133:       if (value === undefined || value === null) {
  134:         return COLUMN_DEFS[col].type === 'INTEGER' ? 0 : ''
  135:       }
  136:       return typeof value === 'number' ? value : String(value)
  137:     })
  138: 
  139:     db.run(UPSERT_SQL, params)
  140: 
  141:     const data = db.export()
  142:     writeFileSync(dbPath, Buffer.from(data))
  143:   } finally {
  144:     db.close()
  145:   }
  146: }
  147: 
  148: function columnDefinition(column: ColumnName, includeDefault = false): string {
  149:   const def = COLUMN_DEFS[column]
  150:   return `${column} ${def.type} NOT NULL${includeDefault ? ` DEFAULT ${def.defaultValue}` : ''}`
  151: }
  152: 
  153: function ensureTableSchema(db: {
  154:   run: (sql: string) => unknown
  155:   exec: (sql: string) => Array<{ values: unknown[][] }>
  156: }): void {
  157:   db.run(CREATE_TABLE_SQL)
  158: 
  159:   const info = db.exec('PRAGMA table_info(transcripts)')
  160:   const existing = new Set(
  161:     info[0]?.values.map((row) => String(row[1] ?? '')) ?? [],
  162:   )
  163: 
  164:   for (const column of DATA_COLUMNS) {
  165:     if (!existing.has(column)) {
  166:       db.run(`ALTER TABLE transcripts ADD COLUMN ${columnDefinition(column, true)}`)
  167:     }
  168:   }
  169: }

    1: /**
    2:  * CLI adapters for `memorytree report build` and `memorytree report serve`.
    3:  */
    4: 
    5: import { createServer } from 'node:http'
    6: import { createReadStream, existsSync, statSync } from 'node:fs'
    7: import { extname, join, resolve, sep } from 'node:path'
    8: import { collectExtraManifestDirs as collectRegisteredProjectManifestDirs } from '../report/extra-manifests.js'
    9: 
   10: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   11: // Build command
   12: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   13: 
   14: export interface CmdReportBuildOptions {
   15:   root: string
   16:   output: string
   17:   noAi: boolean
   18:   model: string
   19:   locale?: string
   20:   reportBaseUrl?: string
   21: }
   22: 
   23: export async function cmdReportBuild(opts: CmdReportBuildOptions): Promise<number> {
   24:   const { buildReport } = await import('../report/build.js')
   25:   try {
   26:     const resolvedRoot = resolve(opts.root)
   27:     const buildOptions = {
   28:       root: resolvedRoot,
   29:       output: resolve(opts.output),
   30:       noAi: opts.noAi,
   31:       model: opts.model,
   32:       ...(opts.locale ? { locale: opts.locale } : {}),
   33:       ...(opts.reportBaseUrl ? { reportBaseUrl: opts.reportBaseUrl } : {}),
   34:       extraManifestDirs: collectRegisteredProjectManifestDirs(resolvedRoot),
   35:     }
   36:     await buildReport(buildOptions)
   37:     console.log(`Report generated at: ${resolve(opts.output)}`)
   38:     console.log(`Open: ${join(resolve(opts.output), 'index.html')}`)
   39:     return 0
   40:   } catch (err: unknown) {
   41:     console.error(`Report build failed: ${String(err)}`)
   42:     return 1
   43:   }
   44: }
   45: 
   46: export function collectExtraManifestDirs(root: string): string[] {
   47:   return collectRegisteredProjectManifestDirs(root)
   48: }
   49: 
   50: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   51: // Serve command
   52: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   53: 
   54: export interface CmdReportServeOptions {
   55:   dir: string
   56:   port: number
   57: }
   58: 
   59: export function cmdReportServe(opts: CmdReportServeOptions): number {
   60:   const root = resolve(opts.dir)
   61:   const port = opts.port
   62: 
   63:   const MIME: Record<string, string> = {
   64:     '.html': 'text/html; charset=utf-8',
   65:     '.css': 'text/css',
   66:     '.js': 'application/javascript',
   67:     '.json': 'application/json',
   68:     '.svg': 'image/svg+xml',
   69:     '.ico': 'image/x-icon',
   70:   }
   71: 
   72:   const server = createServer((req, res) => {
   73:     let urlPath: string
   74:     try {
   75:       urlPath = decodeURIComponent((req.url ?? '/').split('?')[0] ?? '/')
   76:     } catch {
   77:       res.writeHead(400, { 'Content-Type': 'text/plain' })
   78:       res.end('Bad request')
   79:       return
   80:     }
   81: 
   82:     let filePath = join(root, urlPath)
   83: 
   84:     // Containment check: reject paths that escape the serve root
   85:     // Use sep (\ on Windows, / on Unix) so the check works cross-platform.
   86:     if (!filePath.startsWith(root + sep) && filePath !== root) {
   87:       res.writeHead(403, { 'Content-Type': 'text/plain' })
   88:       res.end('Forbidden')
   89:       return
   90:     }
   91: 
   92:     // Serve index.html for directory requests
   93:     if (existsSync(filePath) && statSync(filePath).isDirectory()) {
   94:       filePath = join(filePath, 'index.html')
   95:     }
   96: 
   97:     if (!existsSync(filePath)) {
   98:       res.writeHead(404, { 'Content-Type': 'text/plain' })
   99:       res.end('Not found')
  100:       return
  101:     }
  102: 
  103:     const ext = extname(filePath)
  104:     const contentType = MIME[ext] ?? 'application/octet-stream'
  105:     res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': contentType })
  106:     const stream = createReadStream(filePath)
  107:     stream.on('error', () => { res.destroy() })
  108:     stream.pipe(res)
  109:   })
  110: 
  111:   server.on('error', (err: NodeJS.ErrnoException) => {
  112:     if (err.code === 'EADDRINUSE') {
  113:       console.error(`Error: port ${port} is already in use.`)
  114:       process.exit(1)
  115:     }
  116:     console.error(`Server error: ${String(err)}`)
  117:     process.exit(1)
  118:   })
  119: 
  120:   server.listen(port, () => {
  121:     console.log('Temporary local preview server started.')
  122:     console.log('For long-running local access, prefer Caddy hosting this directory.')
  123:     console.log(`Serving ${root}`)
  124:     console.log(`Open: http://localhost:${port}/`)
  125:     console.log('Press Ctrl+C to stop.')
  126:   })
  127: 
  128:   return 0

    1: /**
    2:  * CLI adapters for `memorytree report build` and `memorytree report serve`.
    3:  */
    4: 
    5: import { createServer } from 'node:http'
    6: import { createReadStream, existsSync, statSync } from 'node:fs'
    7: import { extname, join, resolve, sep } from 'node:path'
    8: import { collectExtraManifestDirs as collectRegisteredProjectManifestDirs } from '../report/extra-manifests.js'
    9: 
   10: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   11: // Build command
   12: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   13: 
   14: export interface CmdReportBuildOptions {
   15:   root: string
   16:   output: string
   17:   noAi: boolean
   18:   model: string
   19:   locale?: string
   20:   reportBaseUrl?: string
   21: }
   22: 
   23: export async function cmdReportBuild(opts: CmdReportBuildOptions): Promise<number> {
   24:   const { buildReport } = await import('../report/build.js')
   25:   try {
   26:     const resolvedRoot = resolve(opts.root)
   27:     const buildOptions = {
   28:       root: resolvedRoot,
   29:       output: resolve(opts.output),
   30:       noAi: opts.noAi,
   31:       model: opts.model,
   32:       ...(opts.locale ? { locale: opts.locale } : {}),
   33:       ...(opts.reportBaseUrl ? { reportBaseUrl: opts.reportBaseUrl } : {}),
   34:       extraManifestDirs: collectRegisteredProjectManifestDirs(resolvedRoot),
   35:     }
   36:     await buildReport(buildOptions)
   37:     console.log(`Report generated at: ${resolve(opts.output)}`)
   38:     console.log(`Open: ${join(resolve(opts.output), 'index.html')}`)
   39:     return 0
   40:   } catch (err: unknown) {
   41:     console.error(`Report build failed: ${String(err)}`)
   42:     return 1
   43:   }
   44: }
   45: 
   46: export function collectExtraManifestDirs(root: string): string[] {
   47:   return collectRegisteredProjectManifestDirs(root)
   48: }
   49: 
   50: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   51: // Serve command
   52: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   53: 
   54: export interface CmdReportServeOptions {
   55:   dir: string
   56:   port: number
   57: }
   58: 
   59: export function cmdReportServe(opts: CmdReportServeOptions): number {
   60:   const root = resolve(opts.dir)
   61:   const port = opts.port
   62: 
   63:   const MIME: Record<string, string> = {
   64:     '.html': 'text/html; charset=utf-8',
   65:     '.css': 'text/css',
   66:     '.js': 'application/javascript',
   67:     '.json': 'application/json',
   68:     '.svg': 'image/svg+xml',
   69:     '.ico': 'image/x-icon',
   70:   }
   71: 
   72:   const server = createServer((req, res) => {
   73:     let urlPath: string
   74:     try {
   75:       urlPath = decodeURIComponent((req.url ?? '/').split('?')[0] ?? '/')
   76:     } catch {
   77:       res.writeHead(400, { 'Content-Type': 'text/plain' })
   78:       res.end('Bad request')
   79:       return
   80:     }
   81: 
   82:     let filePath = join(root, urlPath)
   83: 
   84:     // Containment check: reject paths that escape the serve root
   85:     // Use sep (\ on Windows, / on Unix) so the check works cross-platform.
   86:     if (!filePath.startsWith(root + sep) && filePath !== root) {
   87:       res.writeHead(403, { 'Content-Type': 'text/plain' })
   88:       res.end('Forbidden')
   89:       return
   90:     }
   91: 
   92:     // Serve index.html for directory requests
   93:     if (existsSync(filePath) && statSync(filePath).isDirectory()) {
   94:       filePath = join(filePath, 'index.html')
   95:     }
   96: 
   97:     if (!existsSync(filePath)) {
   98:       res.writeHead(404, { 'Content-Type': 'text/plain' })
   99:       res.end('Not found')
  100:       return
  101:     }
  102: 
  103:     const ext = extname(filePath)
  104:     const contentType = MIME[ext] ?? 'application/octet-stream'
  105:     res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': contentType })
  106:     const stream = createReadStream(filePath)
  107:     stream.on('error', () => { res.destroy() })
  108:     stream.pipe(res)
  109:   })
  110: 
  111:   server.on('error', (err: NodeJS.ErrnoException) => {
  112:     if (err.code === 'EADDRINUSE') {
  113:       console.error(`Error: port ${port} is already in use.`)
  114:       process.exit(1)
  115:     }
  116:     console.error(`Server error: ${String(err)}`)
  117:     process.exit(1)
  118:   })
  119: 
  120:   server.listen(port, () => {
  121:     console.log('Temporary local preview server started.')
  122:     console.log('For long-running local access, prefer Caddy hosting this directory.')
  123:     console.log(`Serving ${root}`)
  124:     console.log(`Open: http://localhost:${port}/`)
  125:     console.log('Press Ctrl+C to stop.')
  126:   })
  127: 
  128:   return 0
  129: }

    1: /**
    2:  * CLI: memorytree discover 鈥?scan and import local transcripts.
    3:  * Port of scripts/discover-transcripts.py
    4:  */
    5: 
    6: import { existsSync } from 'node:fs'
    7: import { basename, resolve } from 'node:path'
    8: 
    9: import { CLIENTS, slugify } from '../transcript/common.js'
   10: import { defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot, discoverSourceFiles, inferProjectSlug, transcriptMatchesRepo } from '../transcript/discover.js'
   11: import { importTranscript, transcriptHasContent } from '../transcript/import.js'
   12: import { parseTranscript } from '../transcript/parse.js'
   13: import { toPosixPath } from '../utils/path.js'
   14: 
   15: export interface DiscoverOptions {
   16:   root: string
   17:   client: string
   18:   scope: string
   19:   projectName: string
   20:   globalRoot: string
   21:   rawUploadPermission: string
   22:   limit: number
   23:   format: string
   24: }
   25: 
   26: export async function cmdDiscover(options: DiscoverOptions): Promise<number> {
   27:   const root = resolve(options.root)
   28:   if (!existsSync(root)) {
   29:     process.stderr.write(`root does not exist: ${root}\n`)
   30:     return 1
   31:   }
   32: 
   33:   const repoSlug = slugify(options.projectName.trim() || basename(root), 'project')
   34:   const globalRoot = options.globalRoot ? resolve(options.globalRoot) : defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot()
   35:   const requestedClients = options.client === 'all' ? CLIENTS : new Set([options.client])
   36:   const discovered = discoverSourceFiles(requestedClients)
   37: 
   38:   const results: Record<string, unknown>[] = []
   39:   const skipped: Record<string, string>[] = []
   40: 
   41:   for (const [client, source] of discovered) {
   42:     if (options.limit > 0 && results.length >= options.limit) break
   43: 
   44:     let parsed
   45:     try {
   46:       parsed = parseTranscript(client, source)
   47:     } catch (err: unknown) {
   48:       skipped.push({
   49:         client,
   50:         source,
   51:         reason: 'parse-error',
   52:         error: summarizeException(err),
   53:       })
   54:       continue
   55:     }
   56: 
   57:     const candidateProject = inferProjectSlug(parsed)
   58:     const matchesCurrentRepo = transcriptMatchesRepo(parsed, root, repoSlug)
   59: 
   60:     if (!transcriptHasContent(parsed)) {
   61:       skipped.push({ client, source, reason: 'no-importable-content', project: candidateProject })
   62:       continue
   63:     }
   64: 
   65:     if (options.scope === 'current-project' && !matchesCurrentRepo) {
   66:       skipped.push({ client, source, reason: 'unrelated-project', project: candidateProject })
   67:       continue
   68:     }
   69: 
   70:     try {
   71:       const result = await importTranscript(
   72:         parsed,
   73:         root,
   74:         globalRoot,
   75:         matchesCurrentRepo ? repoSlug : candidateProject,
   76:         matchesCurrentRepo ? options.rawUploadPermission : 'not-applicable',
   77:         matchesCurrentRepo,
   78:       )
   79:       results.push({ ...result, matches_current_repo: matchesCurrentRepo })
   80:     } catch (err: unknown) {
   81:       skipped.push({
   82:         client,
   83:         source,
   84:         reason: 'import-error',
   85:         project: candidateProject,
   86:         error: summarizeException(err),
   87:       })
   88:     }
   89:   }
   90: 
   91:   const payload = {
   92:     repo: toPosixPath(root),
   93:     repo_project: repoSlug,
   94:     scope: options.scope,
   95:     client_filter: options.client,
   96:     discovered_count: discovered.length,
   97:     imported_count: results.length,
   98:     repo_mirror_count: results.filter(r => r['matches_current_repo']).length,
   99:     global_only_count: results.filter(r => !r['matches_current_repo']).length,
  100:     skipped_count: skipped.length,
  101:     imports: results,
  102:     skipped,
  103:   }
  104: 
  105:   if (options.format === 'json') {
  106:     process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify(payload) + '\n')
  107:   } else {
  108:     process.stdout.write(formatDiscoverText(payload) + '\n')
  109:   }
  110:   return 0
  111: }
  112: 
  113: function formatDiscoverText(payload: Record<string, unknown>): string {
  114:   const lines = [
  115:     `repo: ${payload['repo'] ?? ''}`,
  116:     `repo_project: ${payload['repo_project'] ?? ''}`,
  117:     `scope: ${payload['scope'] ?? ''}`,
  118:     `client_filter: ${payload['client_filter'] ?? ''}`,
  119:     `discovered_count: ${payload['discovered_count'] ?? 0}`,
  120:     `imported_count: ${payload['imported_count'] ?? 0}`,
  121:     `repo_mirror_count: ${payload['repo_mirror_count'] ?? 0}`,
  122:     `global_only_count: ${payload['global_only_count'] ?? 0}`,
  123:     `skipped_count: ${payload['skipped_count'] ?? 0}`,
  124:   ]
  125: 
  126:   const imports = payload['imports']
  127:   if (Array.isArray(imports) && imports.length > 0) {
  128:     lines.push('imports:')
  129:     for (const item of imports.slice(0, 10)) {
  130:       const rec = item as Record<string, unknown>
  131:       lines.push(`- ${rec['client']} ${rec['project']} ${rec['session_id']} repo_mirror=${String(rec['matches_current_repo']).toLowerCase()}`)
  132:     }
  133:     if (imports.length > 10) lines.push(`- ... ${imports.length - 10} more`)
  134:   }
  135:   return lines.join('\n')
  136: }
  137: 
  138: function summarizeException(err: unknown): string {
  139:   if (err instanceof Error) return err.message.trim() || err.constructor.name
  140:   return String(err)
  141: }

    1: /**
    2:  * CLI: memorytree import 鈥?import one transcript file.
    3:  * Port of scripts/import-transcripts.py
    4:  */
    5: 
    6: import { existsSync } from 'node:fs'
    7: import { basename, resolve } from 'node:path'
    8: 
    9: import { slugify } from '../transcript/common.js'
   10: import { defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot, inferProjectSlug, transcriptMatchesRepo } from '../transcript/discover.js'
   11: import { importTranscript, transcriptHasContent } from '../transcript/import.js'
   12: import { inferClient, parseTranscript } from '../transcript/parse.js'
   13: 
   14: export interface ImportOptions {
   15:   root: string
   16:   source: string
   17:   client: string
   18:   projectName: string
   19:   globalRoot: string
   20:   rawUploadPermission: string
   21:   format: string
   22:   forceRepo: boolean
   23: }
   24: 
   25: export async function cmdImport(options: ImportOptions): Promise<number> {
   26:   const root = resolve(options.root)
   27:   const source = resolve(options.source)
   28: 
   29:   if (!existsSync(root)) {
   30:     process.stderr.write(`root does not exist: ${root}\n`)
   31:     return 1
   32:   }
   33:   if (!existsSync(source)) {
   34:     process.stderr.write(`source transcript does not exist: ${source}\n`)
   35:     return 1
   36:   }
   37: 
   38:   const client = inferClient(options.client, source)
   39:   const globalRoot = options.globalRoot ? resolve(options.globalRoot) : defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot()
   40:   const repoSlug = slugify(options.projectName.trim() || basename(root), 'project')
   41: 
   42:   const parsed = parseTranscript(client, source)
   43:   if (!transcriptHasContent(parsed)) {
   44:     process.stderr.write(`source transcript does not contain any importable messages or tool events: ${source}\n`)
   45:     return 1
   46:   }
   47: 
   48:   const detectedProject = inferProjectSlug(parsed)
   49:   const matchesCurrentRepo = options.forceRepo || transcriptMatchesRepo(parsed, root, repoSlug)
   50: 
   51:   const result = await importTranscript(
   52:     parsed,
   53:     root,
   54:     globalRoot,
   55:     matchesCurrentRepo ? repoSlug : detectedProject,
   56:     matchesCurrentRepo ? options.rawUploadPermission : 'not-applicable',
   57:     matchesCurrentRepo,
   58:   )
   59: 
   60:   const output = {
   61:     ...result,
   62:     matches_current_repo: matchesCurrentRepo,
   63:     detected_project: detectedProject,
   64:   } as Record<string, unknown>
   65: 
   66:   if (options.format === 'json') {
   67:     process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify(output) + '\n')
   68:   } else {
   69:     process.stdout.write(formatImportText(output) + '\n')
   70:   }
   71:   return 0
   72: }
   73: 
   74: function formatImportText(result: Record<string, unknown>): string {
   75:   return [
   76:     `client: ${result['client'] ?? ''}`,
   77:     `project: ${result['project'] ?? ''}`,
   78:     `session_id: ${result['session_id'] ?? ''}`,
   79:     `started_at: ${result['started_at'] ?? ''}`,

    1: /**
    2:  * CLI: memorytree import 鈥?import one transcript file.
    3:  * Port of scripts/import-transcripts.py

    5: 
    6: import { existsSync } from 'node:fs'
    7: import { basename, resolve } from 'node:path'
    8: 
    9: import { slugify } from '../transcript/common.js'
   10: import { defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot, inferProjectSlug, transcriptMatchesRepo } from '../transcript/discover.js'
   11: import { importTranscript, transcriptHasContent } from '../transcript/import.js'
   12: import { inferClient, parseTranscript } from '../transcript/parse.js'
   13: 
   14: export interface ImportOptions {
   15:   root: string
   16:   source: string
   17:   client: string
   18:   projectName: string
   19:   globalRoot: string
   20:   rawUploadPermission: string
   21:   format: string
   22:   forceRepo: boolean
   23: }
   24: 
   25: export async function cmdImport(options: ImportOptions): Promise<number> {
   26:   const root = resolve(options.root)
   27:   const source = resolve(options.source)
   28: 
   29:   if (!existsSync(root)) {
   30:     process.stderr.write(`root does not exist: ${root}\n`)
   31:     return 1
   32:   }
   33:   if (!existsSync(source)) {
   34:     process.stderr.write(`source transcript does not exist: ${source}\n`)
   35:     return 1
   36:   }
   37: 
   38:   const client = inferClient(options.client, source)
   39:   const globalRoot = options.globalRoot ? resolve(options.globalRoot) : defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot()
   40:   const repoSlug = slugify(options.projectName.trim() || basename(root), 'project')
   41: 
   42:   const parsed = parseTranscript(client, source)
   43:   if (!transcriptHasContent(parsed)) {
   44:     process.stderr.write(`source transcript does not contain any importable messages or tool events: ${source}\n`)
   45:     return 1
   46:   }
   47: 
   48:   const detectedProject = inferProjectSlug(parsed)
   49:   const matchesCurrentRepo = options.forceRepo || transcriptMatchesRepo(parsed, root, repoSlug)
   50: 
   51:   const result = await importTranscript(
   52:     parsed,
   53:     root,
   54:     globalRoot,
   55:     matchesCurrentRepo ? repoSlug : detectedProject,
   56:     matchesCurrentRepo ? options.rawUploadPermission : 'not-applicable',
   57:     matchesCurrentRepo,
   58:   )
   59: 
   60:   const output = {
   61:     ...result,
   62:     matches_current_repo: matchesCurrentRepo,
   63:     detected_project: detectedProject,
   64:   } as Record<string, unknown>
   65: 
   66:   if (options.format === 'json') {
   67:     process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify(output) + '\n')
   68:   } else {
   69:     process.stdout.write(formatImportText(output) + '\n')
   70:   }
   71:   return 0
   72: }

   74: function formatImportText(result: Record<string, unknown>): string {

    1: /**
    2:  * Recall 鈥?on-demand transcript sync + latest session lookup.
    3:  * Port of scripts/recall-session.py
    4:  */
    5: 
    6: import { existsSync, readFileSync } from 'node:fs'
    7: import { basename, resolve, join } from 'node:path'
    8: 
    9: import initSqlJs from 'sql.js'
   10: 
   11: import { slugify } from '../transcript/common.js'
   12: import { defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot, discoverSourceFiles, transcriptMatchesRepo } from '../transcript/discover.js'
   13: import { importTranscript, transcriptHasContent } from '../transcript/import.js'
   14: import { parseTranscript } from '../transcript/parse.js'
   15: import type { ParsedTranscript, TranscriptEvent } from '../types/transcript.js'
   16: import { toPosixPath } from '../utils/path.js'
   17: 
   18: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   19: // Types
   20: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   21: 
   22: export interface RecallResult {
   23:   found: boolean
   24:   project: string
   25:   repo: string
   26:   imported_count: number
   27:   message?: string
   28:   client?: string
   29:   session_id?: string
   30:   title?: string
   31:   started_at?: string
   32:   cwd?: string
   33:   branch?: string
   34:   message_count?: number
   35:   tool_event_count?: number
   36:   event_count?: number
   37:   global_clean_path?: string
   38:   global_full_path?: string
   39:   clean_content?: string
   40:   normalized_content?: string
   41: }
   42: 
   43: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   44: // Public API
   45: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   46: 
   47: export async function recall(
   48:   root: string,
   49:   projectName: string,
   50:   globalRootOverride: string,
   51:   activationTime: string,
   52: ): Promise<RecallResult> {
   53:   const resolvedRoot = resolve(root)
   54:   const repoSlug = slugify(projectName.trim() || basename(resolvedRoot), 'project')
   55:   const globalRoot = globalRootOverride ? resolve(globalRootOverride) : defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot()
   56:   const effectiveActivation = activationTime || nowIso()
   57: 
   58:   const imported = await syncCurrentProject(resolvedRoot, repoSlug, globalRoot)
   59: 
   60:   const session = await findLatestSession(globalRoot, resolvedRoot, repoSlug, effectiveActivation)
   61: 
   62:   if (session === null) {
   63:     return {
   64:       found: false,
   65:       project: repoSlug,
   66:       repo: toPosixPath(resolvedRoot),
   67:       imported_count: imported,
   68:       message: 'No previous session found for this project.',
   69:     }
   70:   }
   71: 
   72:   const cleanPath = String(session['global_clean_path'] ?? '')
   73:   const fullPath = String(session['global_full_path'] ?? '')
   74:   let cleanContent = ''
   75:   if (cleanPath && existsSync(cleanPath)) {
   76:     try {
   77:       cleanContent = readFileSync(cleanPath, 'utf-8')
   78:     } catch {
   79:       // ignore read errors
   80:     }
   81:   }
   82:   const normalizedContent = loadNormalizedContent(fullPath)
   83: 
   84:   return {
   85:     found: true,
   86:     project: repoSlug,
   87:     repo: toPosixPath(resolvedRoot),
   88:     imported_count: imported,
   89:     client: String(session['client'] ?? ''),
   90:     session_id: String(session['session_id'] ?? ''),
   91:     title: String(session['title'] ?? ''),
   92:     started_at: String(session['started_at'] ?? ''),
   93:     cwd: String(session['cwd'] ?? ''),
   94:     branch: String(session['branch'] ?? ''),
   95:     message_count: Number(session['message_count'] ?? 0),
   96:     tool_event_count: Number(session['tool_event_count'] ?? 0),
   97:     event_count: Number(session['event_count'] ?? 0),
   98:     global_clean_path: cleanPath,
   99:     global_full_path: fullPath,
  100:     clean_content: cleanContent,
  101:     normalized_content: normalizedContent,
  102:   }
  103: }
  104: 
  105: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  106: // Sync current project
  107: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  108: 
  109: export async function syncCurrentProject(root: string, repoSlug: string, globalRoot: string): Promise<number> {
  110:   const discovered = discoverSourceFiles()
  111:   let imported = 0
  112: 
  113:   for (const [client, source] of discovered) {
  114:     let parsed
  115:     try {
  116:       parsed = parseTranscript(client, source)
  117:     } catch {
  118:       continue
  119:     }
  120: 
  121:     if (!transcriptHasContent(parsed)) continue
  122:     if (!transcriptMatchesRepo(parsed, root, repoSlug)) continue
  123: 
  124:     try {
  125:       await importTranscript(parsed, root, globalRoot, repoSlug, 'not-set', true)
  126:       imported++
  127:     } catch {
  128:       continue
  129:     }
  130:   }
  131: 
  132:   return imported
  133: }
  134: 
  135: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  136: // Find latest session
  137: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  138: 
  139: export async function findLatestSession(
  140:   globalRoot: string,
  141:   root: string,
  142:   repoSlug: string,
  143:   activationTime: string,
  144: ): Promise<Record<string, unknown> | null> {
  145:   const dbPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'search.sqlite')
  146:   if (!existsSync(dbPath)) {
  147:     return findLatestFromJsonl(globalRoot, root, repoSlug, activationTime)
  148:   }
  149: 
  150:   try {
  151:     const SQL = await initSqlJs()
  152:     const db = new SQL.Database(readFileSync(dbPath))
  153:     try {
  154:       const stmt = db.prepare(
  155:         'SELECT * FROM transcripts WHERE started_at < ? ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 20',
  156:       )
  157:       stmt.bind([activationTime])
  158: 
  159:       const resolvedRoot = toPosixPath(resolve(root)).toLowerCase()
  160:       const columns = stmt.getColumnNames()
  161: 
  162:       while (stmt.step()) {
  163:         const values = stmt.get()
  164:         const row: Record<string, unknown> = {}
  165:         for (let i = 0; i < columns.length; i++) {
  166:           row[columns[i]!] = values[i]
  167:         }
  168:         const cwd = String(row['cwd'] ?? '')
  169:         const project = String(row['project'] ?? '')
  170:         if (cwdMatches(cwd, resolvedRoot) || project === repoSlug) {
  171:           stmt.free()
  172:           return row
  173:         }
  174:       }
  175:       stmt.free()
  176:     } finally {
  177:       db.close()
  178:     }
  179:   } catch {
  180:     return findLatestFromJsonl(globalRoot, root, repoSlug, activationTime)
  181:   }
  182: 
  183:   return null
  184: }
  185: 
  186: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  187: // JSONL fallback
  188: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  189: 
  190: export function findLatestFromJsonl(
  191:   globalRoot: string,
  192:   root: string,
  193:   repoSlug: string,
  194:   activationTime: string,
  195: ): Record<string, unknown> | null {
  196:   const jsonlPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'sessions.jsonl')
  197:   if (!existsSync(jsonlPath)) return null
  198: 
  199:   const resolvedRoot = toPosixPath(resolve(root)).toLowerCase()
  200:   const candidates: Record<string, unknown>[] = []
  201: 
  202:   let content: string
  203:   try {
  204:     content = readFileSync(jsonlPath, 'utf-8')
  205:   } catch {
  206:     return null
  207:   }
  208: 
  209:   for (const line of content.split('\n')) {
  210:     const trimmed = line.trim()
  211:     if (!trimmed) continue
  212:     let entry: Record<string, unknown>
  213:     try {
  214:       entry = JSON.parse(trimmed) as Record<string, unknown>
  215:     } catch {
  216:       continue
  217:     }
  218: 
  219:     const started = String(entry['started_at'] ?? '')
  220:     if (started >= activationTime) continue
  221: 
  222:     const cwd = String(entry['cwd'] ?? '')
  223:     const project = String(entry['project'] ?? '')
  224:     if (cwdMatches(cwd, resolvedRoot) || project === repoSlug) {
  225:       candidates.push(entry)
  226:     }
  227:   }
  228: 
  229:   if (candidates.length === 0) return null
  230: 
  231:   candidates.sort((a, b) => {
  232:     const aTime = String(a['started_at'] ?? '')
  233:     const bTime = String(b['started_at'] ?? '')
  234:     return bTime.localeCompare(aTime)
  235:   })
  236:   return candidates[0]!
  237: }
  238: 
  239: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  240: // CWD matching
  241: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  242: 
  243: export function cwdMatches(cwd: string, resolvedRoot: string): boolean {
  244:   if (!cwd) return false
  245:   try {
  246:     const cwdResolved = toPosixPath(resolve(cwd)).toLowerCase()
  247:     if (cwdResolved === resolvedRoot) return true
  248:     const prefix = resolvedRoot.endsWith('/') ? resolvedRoot : resolvedRoot + '/'
  249:     return cwdResolved.startsWith(prefix)
  250:   } catch {
  251:     return false
  252:   }
  253: }
  254: 
  255: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  256: // Helpers
  257: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  258: 
  259: function nowIso(): string {
  260:   return new Date().toISOString().replace(/\.\d{3}Z$/, 'Z')
  261: }
  262: 
  263: export function formatText(payload: RecallResult): string {
  264:   if (!payload.found) {
  265:     return [
  266:       `project: ${payload.project}`,
  267:       `imported: ${payload.imported_count}`,
  268:       `result: ${payload.message ?? 'No previous session found.'}`,
  269:     ].join('\n')
  270:   }
  271: 
  272:   const lines = [
  273:     `project: ${payload.project}`,
  274:     `client: ${payload.client ?? ''}`,
  275:     `session_id: ${payload.session_id ?? ''}`,
  276:     `title: ${payload.title ?? ''}`,
  277:     `started_at: ${payload.started_at ?? ''}`,
  278:     `cwd: ${payload.cwd ?? ''}`,
  279:     `branch: ${payload.branch ?? ''}`,
  280:     `messages: ${payload.message_count ?? 0}`,
  281:     `tool_events: ${payload.tool_event_count ?? 0}`,
  282:     `events: ${payload.event_count ?? 0}`,
  283:     `imported_this_sync: ${payload.imported_count}`,
  284:     `clean_transcript: ${payload.global_clean_path ?? ''}`,
  285:   ]
  286: 
  287:   if (payload.global_full_path) {
  288:     lines.push(`full_transcript: ${payload.global_full_path}`)
  289:   }
  290: 
  291:   if (payload.normalized_content) {
  292:     lines.push('', '--- normalized transcript content ---', payload.normalized_content)
  293:   } else if (payload.clean_content) {
  294:     lines.push('', '--- clean transcript content ---', payload.clean_content)
  295:   }
  296: 
  297:   return lines.join('\n')
  298: }
  299: 
  300: function loadNormalizedContent(fullPath: string): string {
  301:   if (!fullPath || !existsSync(fullPath)) return ''
  302: 
  303:   try {
  304:     const raw = readFileSync(fullPath, 'utf-8')
  305:     const parsed = JSON.parse(raw) as ParsedTranscript
  306:     if (Array.isArray(parsed.events) && parsed.events.length > 0) {
  307:       return formatNormalizedEvents(parsed.events)
  308:     }
  309:     if (Array.isArray(parsed.messages) && parsed.messages.length > 0) {
  310:       return parsed.messages
  311:         .map(message => {
  312:           const time = message.timestamp?.slice(11, 19) || '--:--:--'
  313:           return `[${time}] ${message.role}: ${message.text}`
  314:         })
  315:         .join('\n')
  316:     }
  317:   } catch {
  318:     return ''
  319:   }
  320: 
  321:   return ''
  322: }
  323: 
  324: function formatNormalizedEvents(events: TranscriptEvent[]): string {
  325:   return events
  326:     .map(event => {
  327:       const time = event.timestamp?.slice(11, 19) || '--:--:--'
  328:       if (event.kind === 'message') {
  329:         return `[${time}] ${event.role}: ${event.text}`
  330:       }
  331:       if (event.kind === 'reasoning') {
  332:         return `[${time}] reasoning: ${event.summary || event.text || 'Reasoning step recorded.'}`
  333:       }
  334:       if (event.kind === 'tool_call') {
  335:         return `[${time}] tool_call ${event.tool_name}${event.call_id ? ` (${event.call_id})` : ''}: ${event.summary || event.tool_name}`
  336:       }
  337:       if (event.kind === 'tool_result') {
  338:         const suffix = typeof event.exit_code === 'number' ? ` exit=${event.exit_code}` : ''
  339:         return `[${time}] tool_result ${event.tool_name}${event.call_id ? ` (${event.call_id})` : ''}${suffix}: ${event.summary || `${event.tool_name} result`}`
  340:       }
  341:       if (event.kind === 'task_status') {
  342:         return `[${time}] task_${event.status}: ${event.summary || `Task ${event.status}`}`
  343:       }
  344:       if (event.kind === 'token_count') {
  345:         return `[${time}] token_count: ${event.summary || 'Token usage updated.'}`
  346:       }
  347:       return `[${time}] ${event.title || event.kind}: ${event.summary || ''}`.trim()
  348:     })
  349:     .join('\n')
  350: }
